data.title: Create integration test runner and CI caching configuration
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Create the integration test runner and configure CI to cache fixtures.

### tests/integration/run-integration-tests.sh:
- Sources setup-fixtures.sh to ensure fixtures are ready
- Runs all integration test files in tests/integration/ (test-*-integration.sh)
- Aggregates pass/fail counts
- Exits 0 if all tests pass or all skipped (skip is not failure)
- Exits 1 if any test fails (not skipped)
- Prints summary: N passed, M failed, K skipped

### .github/workflows/ or CI config:
- Add step to cache tests/integration/fixtures/ between CI runs using actions/cache@v4 with key based on fixture version manifest
- Alternatively, since fixtures are synthetic (committed to repo), just ensure tests/integration/ is in the test runner's scan path

### Add to tests/run-all.sh or equivalent runner:
Register integration tests as an optional test suite that runs when INTEGRATION_TESTS=1 env var is set (opt-in for CI, off by default for local runs).

### .test-index entries:
Add mappings for all recipe scripts → their integration tests:
- plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-executor.sh: tests/integration/test-add-parameter-integration.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/rope-adapter.sh: tests/integration/test-add-parameter-integration.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-adapter.sh: tests/integration/test-add-parameter-integration.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/integration/run-integration-tests.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/integration/run-integration-tests.sh
- [ ] Runner exits 0 when all tests skip (no fixtures, no failure)
  Verify: TEST_INTEGRATION_SKIP=1 bash tests/integration/run-integration-tests.sh; [ $? -eq 0 ]
- [ ] Valid bash syntax on runner
  Verify: bash -n tests/integration/run-integration-tests.sh
- [ ] .test-index entries added for integration test coverage
  Verify: grep -q 'test-add-parameter-integration' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
